title: Parkinson's Research Page + Fleet Dashboard Improvements
summary: New Parkinson's / PSP-Richardson's research page tracking dual proteinopathy treatment landscape with 13 therapies, 6 action items, and daily autonomous updates. Plus fleet dashboard job summary improvements.

features.title: Parkinson's & PSP Research Page
features.summary: New dedicated page tracking the dual proteinopathy treatment landscape — clinical trials, immunotherapy, diagnostics, and action items.
features.description:
A comprehensive research dashboard at /parkinsons tracking the treatment landscape for dual alpha-synuclein + tau proteinopathy. Features include:

- **6 prioritized action items** — trial enrollment windows (AADvac1 PSP Platform Trial, prasinezumab Phase 3), diagnostic requests, and treatment discussions
- **13 tracked therapies** — vaccines (VacSYn, UB-312, AFFITOPE, AADvac1), antibodies (prasinezumab, bepranemab), GLP-1 neuroprotectants, gene therapy, and delivery technologies
- **5 diagnostic recommendations** — tau PET, CSF biomarkers, genetic testing, DaT-SPECT
- **Evidence tier system** — every therapy and update classified from Tier 1 (published Phase 2/3) to Tier 5 (theoretical)
- **Research timeline** — reverse-chronological feed that will grow daily as the autonomous research loop runs

Designed comfort-mode-first with 44px+ touch targets, large readable text, and high contrast. The page's primary user has Parkinson's.

Includes a Python research updater that integrates with ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API and PubMed for automated daily updates.

features.title: Compact Job Summary in Machine Cards
features.summary: Machine cards with 3+ jobs show a summary line instead of listing each process individually.
features.description: When a machine is running 3+ CPU jobs (e.g., garage-pc with 11 parallel benchmarks), the machine card now shows a compact summary like '12 CPU jobs -- 1 synth:C3_nn + 11 bench:gbdt/full/pnl_call' instead of listing each one individually. Machines with 1-2 jobs still show the full per-process detail. The detailed Currently Running table below is unchanged for when you need per-job info.

features.title: Benchmark Job Names Include Target
features.summary: Benchmark jobs now show which --targets arg they're running, turning 'bench:gbdt/full' into 'bench:gbdt/full/pnl_call'.
features.description: The fleet collector's script name parser now extracts the --targets argument from benchmark commands. This turns generic names like 'bench:gbdt/full' into specific ones like 'bench:gbdt/full/pnl_call' or 'bench:gbdt/full/otm30', so you can tell parallel experiments apart on the dashboard. Updated on both GPU machines and the Mac orchestrator.
